meta.project: Cevichería Belsy — Sistema de Gestión Integral para Restaurantes

product_overview: Cevichería Belsy es una plataforma web modular para restaurantes que centraliza autenticación por rol, operación de salón, cocina, cobro, menú, inventario y reportes en un flujo sincronizado en tiempo real. Su objetivo es reducir errores operativos y acelerar el servicio desde la toma del pedido hasta el cierre de caja.
core_goals: Autenticar usuarios y restringir el acceso según rol (ADMIN, MESERO, COCINERO).
Gestionar mesas, pedidos y entregas con actualización en tiempo real.
Permitir monitoreo y actualización del estado de preparación en cocina.
Administrar menú, categorías, imágenes y disponibilidad de platos.
Procesar cobros, generar comprobantes y liberar mesas tras el pago.
Administrar usuarios, inventario, incidencias y reportes de ventas.
Mantener sincronización operativa mediante WebSockets y persistencia en PostgreSQL.

features.name: Authentication & Role Access
features.description: Permite iniciar y cerrar sesión con credenciales, emitiendo un JWT con rol para controlar el acceso a las vistas y endpoints según el perfil del usuario.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid username and password -> Receive 200 with JWT token, role, and username -> POST /api/auth/logout with valid JWT -> Receive 200 with logout confirmation
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with invalid credentials error
POST /api/auth/login with missing or malformed body -> Receive 400 with validation error
POST /api/auth/logout without JWT or with expired JWT -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Table Map
features.description: Muestra el estado de las mesas y permite mover, separar o reubicar pedidos activos entre mesas para la operación del mesero.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/tables with token -> Receive 200 with table list and statuses -> GET /api/tables/:tableId/active-items for an occupied table -> Receive 200 with active items
POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/tables/:tableId/move with destination table -> Receive 200 with orders moved and table status updated
POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/tables/:tableId/unmerge on a merged table -> Receive 200 with table returned to FREE
POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/tables/:tableId/relocate to a free table -> Receive 200 with relocated order
GET /api/tables without JWT -> Receive 401 unauthorized
PATCH /api/tables/:tableId/move with JWT but invalid or unavailable destination table -> Receive 400 or 409 with move error

features.name: Orders / View Dishes
features.description: Permite consultar platos por categorías, crear pedidos, agregar ítems y marcar entregas por orden o por ítem.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/orders/active -> Receive 200 with active orders -> POST /api/orders for a table -> Receive 200 with created order -> POST /api/orders/:orderId/items with items -> Receive 200 with items added -> PATCH /api/orders/:orderId/deliver -> Receive 200 with order delivered

POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/orders/:orderId -> Receive 200 with order details -> PATCH /api/orders/:orderId/items/:itemId/deliver -> Receive 200 with item marked delivered
POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/orders/:orderId/items with invalid payload -> Receive 400 with validation error
POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/orders/:orderId/deliver before order is READY -> Receive 409 or 400 with delivery state error
GET /api/orders/active without JWT -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Kitchen Management
features.description: Provides the kitchen monitor to list orders and update preparation status for whole orders or individual items.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with COCINERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/kitchen/orders -> Receive 200 with kitchen order list -> PATCH /api/kitchen/orders/:orderId/status with valid status -> Receive 200 with updated order status -> PATCH /api/kitchen/orders/:orderId/items/:itemId/status with valid status -> Receive 200 with updated item status
POST /api/auth/login with COCINERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/kitchen/orders/:orderId/items/:itemId/status from PENDING to IN_PROGRESS -> Receive 200 with updated status
POST /api/auth/login with COCINERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/kitchen/orders/:orderId/status with invalid status value -> Receive 400 with validation error
GET /api/kitchen/orders without JWT -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Menu Administration
features.description: Allows reading categories as mesero and full CRUD administration of menu categories and items, including stock and image management for the admin role.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/menu/admin/categories -> Receive 200 with admin category list -> POST /api/menu/admin/categories with valid data -> Receive 201 or 200 with created category -> POST /api/menu/admin/items with valid item data -> Receive 201 or 200 with created menu item -> PATCH /api/menu/admin/items/:id/image with multipart image upload -> Receive 200 with uploaded image
POST /api/auth/login with MESERO credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/menu/categories -> Receive 200 with categories and items visible to mesero
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/menu/admin/items/:id/stock to mark item unavailable -> Receive 200 with updated stock status
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> DELETE /api/menu/admin/categories/:id while category still has active items -> Receive 409 or 400 with dependency error
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/menu/admin/items with missing required fields -> Receive 400 with validation error
GET /api/menu/admin/categories without JWT or with non-admin role -> Receive 401 unauthorized or 403 forbidden

features.name: Table Payment / Billing
features.description: Calculates bills for tables and takeaway, processes payments, provides receipts, and releases tables after successful payment.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN/Cajero credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/payments/summary -> Receive 200 with tables pending payment -> GET /api/payments/tables/:tableId/bill -> Receive 200 with bill details -> POST /api/payments/tables/:tableId with payment data -> Receive 200 with payment confirmation -> GET /api/payments/receipt/:paymentId -> Receive 200 with downloadable receipt -> PATCH /api/payments/tables/:tableId/release -> Receive 200 with table released

POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN/Cajero credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/payments/takeaway/bill -> Receive 200 with takeaway bill -> POST /api/payments/takeaway with payment data -> Receive 200 with takeaway payment confirmation
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN/Cajero credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/payments/tables/:tableId with incomplete or invalid payment payload -> Receive 400 with validation error
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN/Cajero credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/payments/receipt/:paymentId for unknown payment -> Receive 404 not found
GET /api/payments/summary without JWT -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: User Management
features.description: Provides admin-only management of system users, including listing, creating, updating, and activating or deactivating accounts.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/users -> Receive 200 with user list -> POST /api/users with valid user data -> Receive 201 or 200 with created user -> PATCH /api/users/:id with updated data -> Receive 200 with updated user -> PATCH /api/users/:id/status to deactivate or activate -> Receive 200 with status updated
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/users with username already in use -> Receive 409 or 400 with uniqueness error
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/users/:id with invalid role or short password -> Receive 400 with validation error
GET /api/users with non-admin token -> Receive 403 forbidden or 401 unauthorized

features.name: Sales Reports
features.description: Generates daily, weekly, monthly, payment-history, dashboard, and closure reports, with Excel exports for administrative analysis.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/reports/daily -> Receive 200 with daily sales metrics -> GET /api/reports/daily/export -> Receive 200 with downloadable Excel file -> POST /api/reports/daily/close -> Receive 200 with daily closure created -> GET /api/reports/closures -> Receive 200 with closure list -> GET /api/reports/closures/:id/export -> Receive 200 with closure Excel export

POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/reports/payments?from=DATE&to=DATE -> Receive 200 with payment history -> GET /api/reports/payments/export with the same range -> Receive 200 with exported Excel file

POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/reports/dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard statistics -> GET /api/reports/weekly -> Receive 200 with weekly sales -> GET /api/reports/monthly -> Receive 200 with monthly sales
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/reports/payments with a date range beyond allowed limits -> Receive 400 with range validation error
GET /api/reports/daily without JWT -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Warehouse / Inventory Control
features.description: Manages supply categories, supplies, and stock registration for the warehouse and inventory process.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> GET /api/inventory/categories -> Receive 200 with supply categories -> POST /api/inventory/categories with valid data -> Receive 201 or 200 with created supply category -> POST /api/inventory/supplies with valid data -> Receive 201 or 200 with created supply -> PATCH /api/inventory/supplies/:id/stock with stock entry data -> Receive 200 with stock updated
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> PATCH /api/inventory/categories/:id with updated category data -> Receive 200 with updated category
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> DELETE /api/inventory/supplies/:id while supply is in use -> Receive 409 or 400 with dependency error
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/inventory/supplies with missing unit or minimum stock -> Receive 400 with validation error
GET /api/inventory/supplies without JWT -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Payment Cancellation / Incidents
features.description: Supports forced release of a table or order item without payment and provides an incidents list for audit and loss tracking.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/incidents/tables/:tableId with incident reason -> Receive 200 with table force released and incident recorded -> GET /api/incidents -> Receive 200 with incident list
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/incidents/items/:orderItemId with incident reason -> Receive 200 with order item force released and incident recorded
POST /api/auth/login with ADMIN credentials -> Receive JWT -> POST /api/incidents/tables/:tableId with missing reason or invalid payload -> Receive 400 with validation error
GET /api/incidents without JWT or with non-admin role -> Receive 401 unauthorized or 403 forbidden

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Exposes a lightweight liveness probe for service monitoring.
user_flows: GET /health without authentication -> Receive 200 with status and timestamp
GET /health during degraded or stopped service dependencies -> Receive 200 with service alive response, or monitoring detects failure if endpoint unavailable

features.name: Authentication & Role Access (US-01)
features.description: Username/password login issuing a 30-minute JWT carrying role (ADMIN, MESERO, COCINERO). Logout endpoint.

endpoints.description: Authenticate with username and password, returns JWT token, role and username

features.name: Table Map (Hme-01)
features.description: View table map and manage table movements, merges and order relocation. MESERO role.

endpoints.description: Get active items for a table
Move all active orders to another table
Unmerge a merged table back to FREE
Relocate an occupied table order to a free table

features.name: Orders / View Dishes (Hme-02 & Hme-03)
features.description: Create and manage orders, add items, deliver orders and items. MESERO role.

endpoints.description: Create a new order for a table
Add items to an existing order
Mark an entire order as delivered
Mark a single order item as delivered

features.name: Kitchen Management (HCoc-01)
features.description: Kitchen monitor listing orders and updating order/item preparation status. COCINERO role.

endpoints.description: Update a single item's preparation status

features.name: Menu Administration (Had-02)
features.description: Manage categories and menu items including stock and images. MESERO can read categories; ADMIN manages.

features.name: Table Payment / Billing (Had-01)
features.description: Compute bills, process payments for tables and takeaway, download receipts, release tables. ADMIN/Cajero role.

features.name: User Management (Had-03)
features.description: ADMIN-only CRUD for system users and account status.

features.name: Sales Reports (Had-04 / Had-07 / Had-08)
features.description: ADMIN-only daily reports, closures, payment history, dashboard and weekly/monthly sales, with Excel export.

features.name: Warehouse / Inventory Control (Had-05 & Had-06)
features.description: ADMIN-only management of supply categories, supplies and stock registration.

features.name: Payment Cancellation / Incidents (Had-09)
features.description: ADMIN-only forced release of tables/items and incident listing.

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Liveness probe.

known_limitations.issue: JWT tokens expire after 30 minutes with no refresh mechanism
Inventory/incidents route mount paths must be confirmed in app.ts (Had-05, Had-09 may not be mounted)
known_limitations.impact: Some endpoints may return 404 if their routers are not registered
